parsed.rationale: Validated engine signals -0.586 short with price below 200d SMA, supporting downtrend structure. However, bear case identifies material risks: 5d momentum (+0.74%) is weak, 63d return (-3.32%) suggests exhaustion, and 87th percentile volatility increases slippage risk on Monday open entry. Scale below 1.0 to moderate position size; avoid full -1.0 into potential mean-reversion trap with thin conviction.
